channel.title: Insight Chronicles
channel.description: Independent long-form analysis on history, geopolitics, and technology.

item.title: Test Article 3 – Automation Publishing Check
item.description: This is a test post generated automatically from drafts using GitHub Actions.

item.title: Democratization of India’s Hardware, Manufacturing & Bio Labs Public Infrastructure for the Next Generation Entrepreneurs
item.description: India’s next leap will come from democratizing machine-tool labs, hardware innovation centers, CNC facilities, furnaces, 3D-printing, and public bio-labs — enabling a new generation of inventors and product creators.

item.title: How India’s Plan of Democratizing Public Services Will Guide Other Countries and Break Monopolies
item.description: A breakdown of how India’s digital public infrastructure model is democratizing payments, identity, commerce, credit, logistics, education, health and governance — and what the world can learn from it.
